headline: Crypto Plunges 5%: BTC, ETH Lead $20B Sell-Off

article.title: Price predictions 5/22: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH

headline: US House Probes 2 Crypto Firms Over Insider Trades

article.title: US House lawmakers launch probe into Kalshi, Polymarket insider trading
article.summary: Representative James Comer asked CEOs of two major prediction market companies for information on their responses to insider trading after “suspiciously timed trades” related to US military actions against Iran.

headline: Emerging Assets Rise 3% on Peace Deal Hopes

article.title: Emerging Assets Post Positive Week as Hopes for Peace Deal Grow
article.summary: Emerging-market stocks and currencies gained on the week as investors grew increasingly hopeful that the US and Iran are moving closer to a peace deal.

headline: Bitcoin Reserve Bill Cuts 1M BTC Purchase Target
